item.label: Reference Resolution
item.summary: Resolve all cross-references between planning objects

body:
# Description

Implement this task.


# Reference Resolution

## Purpose

Resolve all cross-references between planning objects.

## Scope

- Update all references
- Link objects
- Validate

## Implementation

1. Update references
2. Link objects
3. Validate

## Acceptance Criteria

1. All references updated
2. Objects linked
3. Validation passes
